|| SHUBH VIVAH ||

Together with their families

Deep & Meha

Invite you to celebrate their union

22nd & 23rd June 2026
Oswal Centre, Jamnagar

Day 1: 22nd June

Mandap & Mameru

Mandap: 2:30 PM at Keshav Hall

Mameru: 4:00 PM Onwards

Dress Code (Traditional)
Men: Kurta Pyjama | Women: Gharcholas/Bandhani/Sarees

Ring Ceremony & Sangeet

June 22nd | 7:30 PM Onwards

Join us for an evening of music, dance, and celebration!

Dress Code (Indo-Western)
Men: Kurta/Indo Western | Women: Chaniya Choli/Gowns

Day 2: 23rd June

Haldi Ceremony

9:00 AM Onwards

Let's drench the couple in yellow hues of love!

Dress Code (Yellow/Traditional)
Men: Kurta | Women: Plazzo Suit/Sarees

Baraat & Lagan

June 23rd | 4:00 PM Onwards

The Grand Celebration

Dress Code (Royal Formals)
Men: Jodhpuri/Modi Coat | Women: Sarees/Chaniya Choli

We await your presence!
